hypothesis: Systems-optimizer salvage becomes safer if runner-policy must front-load the exact scope-local promotion bundle before stale-truth-sensitive observability commands.
measurement: Before the ratchet, `CLAW/scripts/verify-systems-optimizer.mjs` only checked a subset of systems-optimizer salvage commands and allowed `runner-policy.json` to start with `node CLAW/scripts/run-site-script.mjs claw:validate`, so stale integration truth could stop recovery before self-verifier, binding, or equation-law checks ran. After the ratchet, the verifier requires the exact scope-local promotion bundle as the systems-optimizer salvage prefix and rejects any ordering that places `claw:validate` or `claw:health` ahead of it, while the fixed evaluation bundle stays green.
keep_rule: Keep only if the verifier rejects any systems-optimizer salvage order that does not begin with the exact scope-local promotion bundle or that moves `claw:validate` or `claw:health` ahead of it, and the fixed evaluation bundle passes without touching route implementation paths.
learning_item: Systems-optimizer salvage must front-load the full scope-local promotion bundle before `claw:validate` or `claw:health`, or stale integration truth can preempt local contract drift and GGD law checks.
